name: xcode-skills
description: Apple-authored agent skills exported unchanged from Xcode 27 for Swift and Apple platform development

interface.shortDescription: Apple-authored skills exported unchanged from Xcode 27.
interface.longDescription: Use Apple's exported Xcode 27 guidance for SwiftUI, UIKit modernization, Swift Testing, device verification, C bounds safety, and Xcode security settings.
defaultPrompt: Review this SwiftUI code using Apple's Xcode 27 guidance.
Modernize this UIKit app for current multi-window APIs.
Audit this Xcode project's security build settings.
